description: Independent Bitcoin mining intelligence platform. Hardware specs, hosting provider analysis, profitability tools, and educational content for retail Bitcoin miners.
affiliate_disclosure: Lightning Mines has an affiliate relationship with Abundant Miners. Commission is earned per machine deployed. This is disclosed on all relevant pages.
content: 30+ educational articles, 27 miner profiles, 24 hosting provider profiles
data_policy: All data independently verified from primary sources. No paid placements in rankings.
